overview.heading: International Preparatory Program
overview.description: A pathway for international students: one year of Chinese language study followed by a four-year (four-technical) bachelor's degree, studying alongside Taiwanese students. Students continue into the degree program without a separate re-application.
overview.location: No. 49, Zhonghua Road, Xinshi District, Tainan City 744, Taiwan

items.title: Years 2–4
items.description: Part-time work plus internship, 40 hours per week.
